pageContext.name: Nightmare Before Christmas
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Enesco are excited to present the Nightmare Before Christmas Figurine!  Standing at 9' tall, Jack Skellington and Sally are pictured on a detailed Halloween backdrop as seen in The Nightmare Before Christmas.  This Disney collectible has LED lights and requires three (3) AAA batteries.  Disney fans, don't miss your chance to add this Nightmare Before Christmas figurine to your Disney collection today!
